message:
test(inode): add 12 edge-case tests for serialize/locate/checksum paths

Cover: out-of-range inodes, block offset within table, large uid/gid
(32-bit split), large file sizes (>4GB), xattr ibody preservation,
sub-128-byte checksums, sequential creates, write-and-readback,
directory deletion, zero-nsec timestamps, 48-bit blocks/file_acl.
Total: 21 tests (was 9).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
